name: Radar
description: Phosphor range-rings on a night console, contacts blinking between sweeps — every redraw repositions the blips and re-tunes the rings.

code.style: --blip: @p(var(--color2), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --ringo: @rand(0.25, 0.6); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: @p(8%, 18%, 28%); border: calc(18px / @Y) solid var(--color1); border-radius: 50%; opacity: var(--ringo); box-sizing: border-box; transition: ease 600ms; } } @random(0.4) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: @rand(6%, 11%); left: @rand(14%, 76%); top: @rand(14%, 76%); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--blip); box-shadow: 0 0 calc(90px / @Y) var(--color1); transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
